meta.name: Athletic Edge
meta.description: A high-energy, image-led sportswear store with a clean, modern aesthetic. Heavy use of full-bleed lifestyle imagery, bold typography, and a grid-based layout for editorial content blocks. Focuses heavily on prominent CTAs overlaid on dynamic photography.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Features a very thin, light grey utility bar above the main header containing secondary links. Main header has logo on left, centered navigation links, and icon-only actions on the right.

footer.notes: Clean multi-column layout with a top section for links divided into categories, and a bottom section for legal/copyright information separated by a thin subtle border.

productCard.notes: The primary product showcase shown is a carousel of 'Icons'. These are large, landscape-oriented product shots on a gradient grey background with a pill-shaped label overlaid at the bottom left.

productGrid.notes: Grid layout is mostly used for large editorial image blocks rather than standard product grids. The product showcase section uses a horizontal scrolling carousel.

featuredProducts.label: Shop Our Icons
featuredProducts.heading: Shop Our Icons
featuredProducts.notes: Horizontal scrolling carousel with prominent left/right navigation arrows placed above the content on the right.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width single column, overlaid content in bottom left

design.text: White text overlaid on image. Small subhead, very large bold display headline, normal weight body text.
design.styling: No borders, edge-to-edge image, content anchored to bottom-left with generous padding.

content.headline: Massive, bold display typography in uppercase
content.body: Short sentence describing the product benefit
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with dark text, solid fill, small text.

media.description: Dynamic, moody product shot of a trail running shoe surrounded by smoke and moss/rocks on a table.

content.specialElements: Text subhead above main headline acts as a product identifier.

sections.notes: High contrast between the white typography and the dark, textured background image.

sections.name: editorial-grid-1

design.background: Inherits page background, but columns are filled entirely by images
design.text: White text overlaid on bottom-left of each image block. Small subhead, larger headline.
design.styling: Small gap between the two columns. Images are tall/portrait orientation.

content.headline: Campaign specific headlines
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with dark text on each block.

media.description: Two distinct lifestyle images: left shows a person in vibrant athletic wear hanging off a structure, right shows a person standing in light-colored sportswear in an urban setting.

sections.notes: Classic editorial 'split' banner approach used heavily in sportswear and fashion.

sections.name: editorial-grid-2

design.background: Inherits page background, columns filled by images
design.text: White text overlaid on bottom-left of each image block.
design.styling: Small gap between columns. Same layout as editorial-grid-1.

content.headline: Campaign specific headlines
content.cta: White pill-shaped buttons. Left image has one CTA, right image has two CTAs side-by-side.

media.description: Left: moody portrait of a man in dark green sportswear against a green background. Right: three women in mixed athletic/casual wear against a concrete backdrop.

sections.notes: Continuance of the editorial block pattern.

sections.name: secondary-hero
sections.layout: Full-width single column, overlaid content in bottom left

design.text: White text overlaid on image. Subhead and headline.

content.headline: Campaign headline
content.cta: Single white pill-shaped button with dark text.

media.description: Action shot of a runner from behind on a road at dusk, showing motion blur.

sections.notes: Provides a break between the grid sections and the upcoming product carousel.

sections.name: icon-carousel
sections.layout: Header with title left and nav arrows right, followed by a horizontally scrolling row of large product cards.

design.text: Dark text for header. Dark text inside pill overlays on cards.
design.styling: Cards have a light grey gradient background. Large visual presence.

content.headline: Section title indicating featured iconic products

media.description: Large, detailed side-profile shots of footwear on seamless grey gradient backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Circular, light-grey prev/next navigation arrows positioned above the carousel on the right side. Each product image has a white, pill-shaped label identifying the product family in the bottom left corner.

sections.notes: This section acts more like a category or franchise discovery portal rather than direct 'add to cart' product cards.

sections.name: category-links

design.text: Dark headings, slightly muted grey links.

sections.notes: A 'fat footer' style directory of popular search terms and categories placed before the actual footer.
